name: Rock Check-in Manager - Next Gen

fields.name: Primary Color
fields.description: The primary color used to highlight screen elements, such as the main button.

fields.description: The link color used to highlight screen elements, such as the main button.

fields.description: The info color used to paint alert, label, badges.

fields.description: The success color used to paint alert, label, badges.

fields.description: The warning color used to paint alert, label, badges.
